key_points.text: NVIDIA has reaffirmed that its China data-center exposure is limited and already largely de-risked, with management stating the proposed export restrictions would not materially affect its outlook or guidance.

citation.quote: NVIDIA pushed back hard on the day's report of potential U.S. export restrictions, telling investors its China data-center exposure is limited and already largely de-risked and that the proposed measures would not materially affect its outlook or guidance.

key_points.text: NVIDIA launched a next-generation inference platform with marquee customers committing to early adoption, which analysts say reinforces NVIDIA's data-center moat and broadens demand beyond model training.

citation.quote: At the same event the company unveiled a next-generation inference platform, with several marquee customers committing to early adoption, a launch analysts said reinforces NVIDIA's data-center moat and broadens demand well beyond model training.
